since_last: 18% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 18% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.98% · BTC -2.79% · Gold -2.39% · Nasdaq100 -1.12%. 18% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.02%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.02%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.56%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.56%, BIDU +4.38%, AVGO +4.09%, ANET +3.93%, AMBA +1.18%. Laggards: PANW -6.22%, UPST -5.55%, INTC -5.00%, CRNC -4.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.00% at $149.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
